race.comment: TRIOMPHE (2) continued the good recent form when he finished just 1.75 lengths away in second last time out over 1300m at Stawell. Racing too consistently to dismiss and draws to get every chance to land that elusive win. SUNSET BEAUTY (6) will find this a little easier than her last run just eight days ago when sixth over 1400m at Pakenham. No surprise to see her back in form this time. SIMPLY SASSY (5) wasn't far away in her two starts prior to a sub-par fifth last time out over 1300m at Stawell. Well placed and can bounce back. INFINITE JEST (1) has drawn horribly, but ran up to a nice Moe jumpout win with a super first-up second when backed at a price. He'll have come on from that and has more improvement in store than most. LITTLEBIRDIE (13) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when she was always well out of her ground over 1500m at Mornington. Drawn awkwardly, but looks well-placed.
